name: Pasta Puttanesca
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Spaghetti or 1 lb. fresh pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil over low heat in a large skillet. Add the garlic and mashed anchovies, stir until almost dissolved, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the capers, red pepper flakes, and olives; cook for 1 minute. Add the basil and tomatoes; bring to a slow boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10-12 minutes. If the sauce seems too dry, add a little of the reserved juice. Remove from the heat and stir in the parsley.
3. Pour the sauce over the cooked pasta. Serve Parmesan on the side.
